PageLink.generated is a React component belonging to the marketing web app template built on Next.js, part of the broader OKF template ecosystem for architecture diagram tooling. As a generated artifact, it represents a code unit produced automatically rather than authored by hand, suggesting it is derived from some upstream configuration, schema, or content model associated with the marketing site template.

In practical use, this component would be consumed within the Next.js application as part of its page composition, functioning as a link element tied to page navigation within the marketing site. Since it is marked as generated, developers working with this template should treat it as an output of a build or scaffolding step rather than a file to be directly edited, with any necessary changes made upstream at whatever source generates it.

Beyond its identification as a React Component within the template-marketing-webapp-nextjs package, no further structural details, props, dependencies, or behavioral specifics are available for this concept.
